name: ai-trip-planner
description: Smart AI Trip Planner Root Project

scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd frontend && npm install"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5000" "cd frontend && npm start"
